title: Raytheon (RTX) Wins $511.6M Deal for F135 Propulsion System
text: Raytheon's (RTX) business segment, Pratt & Whitney, secures a $511.6 million modification contract involving the F135 propulsion system.

title: Raytheon (RTX) Wins $397.7M Deal to Support ESSM Production
text: Raytheon (RTX) secures a $397.7 million modification contract to support ESSM Missile Block 2 production requirements.

title: Air Corsica Takes Delivery of First ATR 72-600 Aircraft Powered by Pratt & Whitney Canada's PW127XT-M Engines
text: New engines are more fuel efficient and less expensive to operate than previous models LONGUEUIL, QC , Nov. 29, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Pratt & Whitney, a Raytheon Technologies (NYSE: RTX) business, ATR and Air Corsica today celebrated the delivery of the first PW127XT-M-powered next generation of ATR 72-600 aircraft. The debut of the upgraded PW127XT engine series, which will be the standard powerplant for all ATR42/72-600s, delivers significant improvement in operating costs, maintenance, and sustainability for regional turboprops.

title: Cowen analyst names Raytheon stock his ‘best idea' for 2023
text: Raytheon Technologies Corp (NYSE: RTX) has recovered about 15% over the past two months but a Cowen analyst is convinced it's not yet done pleasing its shareholders.

title: Raytheon Stock Named a 'Best Idea' for 2023
text: As the calendar turns to December, investors are thinking about stocks for 2023. Cowen likes Raytheon Technologies shares for the new year.

title: Raytheon Technologies: Commercial Aerospace Remains Strong
text: Raytheon Technologies Corp. ( RTX , Financial) has gained more than 9% over the last year, which compares extremely well to the 15.3% decline in the industrial sector and the 17.1% drop for the S&P 500 Index.

title: Japan Maritime Self-Defense Force, Missile Defense Agency demonstrate new layered missile defense capability
text: Japan intercepts targets with Raytheon Missiles & Defense's SM-3® Block IB and SM-3 Block IIA OFF THE COAST OF KAUAI, Hawaii , Nov. 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- During a demonstration here, Japan's Maritime Self-Defense Force successfully intercepted short and medium-range ballistic missile targets with SM-3® Block IB and SM-3 Block IIA interceptors. This is the first time a non-U.S. maritime service intercepted targets with both variants of interceptors and it is the first time a Japanese ship fired SM-3 Block IIA.

title: Raytheon's (RTX) Arm Wins $113.9M Deal for the AIM-9X Missile
text: Raytheon's (RTX) business unit, Missiles & Defense, clinches a $113.9 million modification contract involving AIM-9X.

title: Raytheon (RTX) Secures Deal to Support RAM 2B Guided Missile

title: Raytheon Technologies Corporation (RTX) Presents at Baird 52nd Annual Global Industrial Conference 2022

title: Raytheon: Mixed Q3 Due To Supply Chain Issues, But Improving
text: RTX shares have risen 7.1% since Q3 results two weeks ago, but are still attractive in our view, with a 20.3x P/E and a 2.3% Dividend Yield. Q3 again saw strong EBIT growth in RTX's Aerospace segments, but supply chain headwinds caused declines in its Defense segments.

title: Raytheon Technologies collaborates with Microsoft to accelerate key business priorities through cloud adoption
text: Cloud-based approach optimizes business operations and delivers new forms of customer value REDMOND, Wash. , Nov. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Raytheon Technologies is deepening its collaboration with Microsoft Corp. (Nasdaq: MSFT) to equip the aerospace and defense company's employees with cloud-based tools, technologies, and platforms to enhance collaboration, optimize operations and unlock intelligent insights that drive greater value for customers.
